title: defects.jsonl row
description: Per-row schema for projects/<proj>/defects.jsonl. Each line is one JSON object. Writer: skills/comic-production/scripts/checks_ledger.py::append_defects() (lines 102-158). JSONL has no header, so the schema applies row-by-row.

rule_id.description: e.g. 'L1.5', 'L11', 'L17', 'L20_chapter'. Rule set evolves; schema does not enumerate.

retry_history.description: Empty by default; populated by the retry/regen loop with prior-attempt summaries.
